case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS HILL, DUSTIN B.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,732.00 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT HILL, DUSTIN B. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-29-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HILL, DUSTIN B. $1,732.00 PRINCIPAL, $26.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,758.00, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
